app.description:
Webhooks lets you connect your account with external systems and automate workflows in real time.
Instantly send appointment, customer, or payment events to your own apps or third-party services — enabling powerful integrations and seamless data sync.

url.label: Webhook URL
url.tooltip: Enter the URL where webhook events will be sent via POST requests

secret.label: Webhook Secret (Optional)
secret.tooltip: If provided, webhook payloads will be signed with HMAC-SHA256. Leave empty to send webhooks without signatures.

eventTypes.label: Event Types
eventTypes.tooltip: Select which events should trigger webhooks to this URL

created.label: Appointment created
created.description: Emitted when a new appointment is created

rescheduled.label: Appointment updated
rescheduled.description: Emitted when an appointment is updated (full event save, including reschedule fields)

slotRescheduled.label: Appointment rescheduled
slotRescheduled.description: Emitted when only appointment time or duration changes

created.label: Customer created
created.description: Emitted when a new customer is created

updated.label: Customer updated
updated.description: Emitted when customer data is updated

deleted.label: Customers deleted
deleted.description: Emitted when one or more customers are deleted

created.label: Payment created
created.description: Emitted when a payment is created

updated.label: Payment updated
updated.description: Emitted when a payment is updated

deleted.label: Payment deleted
deleted.description: Emitted when a payment is deleted

refunded.label: Payment refunded
refunded.description: Emitted when a payment is refunded

created.label: Gift card created
created.description: Emitted when a gift card is created

updated.label: Gift card updated
updated.description: Emitted when a gift card is updated

deleted.label: Gift cards deleted
deleted.description: Emitted when gift cards are deleted

statusChanged.label: Gift cards status changed
statusChanged.description: Emitted when gift card status changes

created.label: Field created
created.description: Emitted when a booking field is created

updated.label: Field updated
updated.description: Emitted when a booking field is updated

deleted.label: Fields deleted
deleted.description: Emitted when booking fields are deleted

created.label: Addon created
created.description: Emitted when an addon is created

updated.label: Addon updated
updated.description: Emitted when an addon is updated

created.label: Appointment option created
created.description: Emitted when a service/option is created

updated.label: Appointment option updated
updated.description: Emitted when a service/option is updated

created.label: Discount created
created.description: Emitted when a discount is created

updated.label: Discount updated
updated.description: Emitted when a discount is updated

applied.label: Discount applied to appointment
applied.description: Emitted when a discount is applied during booking

created.label: Waitlist entry created
created.description: Emitted when a waitlist entry is created (Waitlist app)

dismissed.label: Waitlist entries dismissed
dismissed.description: Emitted when waitlist entries are dismissed (Waitlist app)

created.label: Form response created
created.description: Emitted when a form response is submitted (Forms app)

url.max: Webhook URL must be at most 2048 characters long

secret.max: Webhook secret must be at most 256 characters long

eventTypes.required: Please select at least one event type
